sys_update_set.description: Update Set containing the Scripted REST API (POST /events and GET /summary) and server-side TS modules.
sys_update_set.name: SynkNode Scripted REST API

sys_update_xml.name: sys_module_3600eb9a68ab42e9bc51a40e3de9a190
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_module"> <sys_module action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>3600eb9a68ab42e9bc51a40e3de9a190</sys_id> <sys_scope display_value="x_synknode">26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_module_3600eb9a68ab42e9bc51a40e3de9a190</sys_update_name> <content><![CDATA[{ "name": "synknode-analytics", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "SynkNode Platform Analytics Integration Scoped App", "main": "index.js", "scripts": { "build": "now-sdk build", "pack": "now-sdk pack", "clean": "now-sdk clean" }, "devDependencies": { "@servicenow/sdk": "^4.7.2", "typescript": "^5.0.0" } }]]></content> <external_source>false</external_source> <path>x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/package.json</path> <sys_name>x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/package.json</sys_name> </sys_module> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_module_429cc5f891b9415498b2a5daeefc6391
sys_update_xml.payload:
<record_update table="sys_module">
  <sys_module action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>429cc5f891b9415498b2a5daeefc6391</sys_id>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_synknode">26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9</sys_scope>
    <sys_update_name>sys_module_429cc5f891b9415498b2a5daeefc6391</sys_update_name>
    <content><![CDATA[import { gs } from '@servicenow/glide';
export function processSummary(request, response) {
    try {
        // 1. Total transfer count
        var countGA = new GlideAggregate("x_synknode_events");
        countGA.addQuery("event_type", "file_transfer");
        countGA.addAggregate("COUNT");
        countGA.query();
        var totalTransfers = 0;
        if (countGA.next()) {
            totalTransfers = parseInt(countGA.getAggregate("COUNT")) || 0;
        }
        // 2. Total bytes transferred
        var bytesGA = new GlideAggregate("x_synknode_events");
        bytesGA.addQuery("event_type", "file_transfer");
        bytesGA.addAggregate("SUM", "size_bytes");
        bytesGA.query();
        var totalBytes = 0;
        if (bytesGA.next()) {
            totalBytes = parseInt(bytesGA.getAggregate("SUM", "size_bytes")) || 0;
        }
        // 3. Average transfer duration in ms
        var durationGA = new GlideAggregate("x_synknode_events");
        durationGA.addQuery("event_type", "file_transfer");
        durationGA.addAggregate("AVG", "transfer_duration_ms");
        durationGA.query();
        var avgDurationMs = 0;
        if (durationGA.next()) {
            avgDurationMs = parseFloat(durationGA.getAggregate("AVG", "transfer_duration_ms")) || 0;
        }
        // 4. Count of unique senders (users)
        var uniqueCount = 0;
        var sendersMap = {};
        var senderGR = new GlideRecord("x_synknode_events");
        senderGR.addQuery("event_type", "file_transfer");
        senderGR.query();
        while (senderGR.next()) {
            var sId = senderGR.getValue("sender_id");
            if (sId && !sendersMap[sId]) {
                sendersMap[sId] = true;
                uniqueCount++;
            }
        }
        var uniqueSenders = uniqueCount;
        // 5. Breakdown of transfers by file_type
        var fileTypeGA = new GlideAggregate("x_synknode_events");
        fileTypeGA.addQuery("event_type", "file_transfer");
        fileTypeGA.addAggregate("COUNT");
        fileTypeGA.groupBy("file_type");
        fileTypeGA.query();
        var breakdown = [];
        while (fileTypeGA.next()) {
            var fType = fileTypeGA.getValue("file_type") || "unknown";
            var fCount = parseInt(fileTypeGA.getAggregate("COUNT")) || 0;
            breakdown.push({
                file_type: fType,
                count: fCount
            });
        }
        response.setStatus(200);
        response.setBody({
            total_transfers: totalTransfers,
            total_bytes_transferred: totalBytes,
            average_transfer_duration_ms: avgDurationMs,
            unique_senders: uniqueSenders,
            file_type_breakdown: breakdown
        });
    }
    catch (ex) {
        gs.error("Error in SynkNode Summary GET API: " + ex.message);
        response.setStatus(500);
        response.setBody({ error: ex.message });
    }
}
]]></content>
    <external_source>false</external_source>
    <path>x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/src/server/summary-handler.ts</path>
    <sys_name>x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/src/server/summary-handler.ts</sys_name>
  </sys_module>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_module_b339fb36367a49a68fa6688d9cabe628
sys_update_xml.payload:
<record_update table="sys_module">
  <sys_module action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
    <sys_id>b339fb36367a49a68fa6688d9cabe628</sys_id>
    <sys_scope display_value="x_synknode">26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9</sys_scope>
    <sys_update_name>sys_module_b339fb36367a49a68fa6688d9cabe628</sys_update_name>
    <content><![CDATA[import { gs } from '@servicenow/glide';
export function processEvents(request, response) {
    try {
        var reqBody = request.body.data;
        if (!reqBody) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            response.setBody({ error: "Missing request body" });
            return;
        }
        // Input validation
        var eventType = reqBody.event_type;
        var senderId = reqBody.sender_id || "";
        var fileName = reqBody.file?.name || reqBody.file_name || "";
        var timestampStr = reqBody.timestamp;
        if (!eventType) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            response.setBody({ error: "Missing required field: event_type" });
            return;
        }
        if (eventType === "file_transfer" && !senderId) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            response.setBody({ error: "Missing required field: sender_id for file_transfer" });
            return;
        }
        if (eventType === "file_transfer" && !fileName) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            response.setBody({ error: "Missing required field: file.name for file_transfer" });
            return;
        }
        if (!timestampStr) {
            response.setStatus(400);
            response.setBody({ error: "Missing required field: timestamp" });
            return;
        }
        // Insert into x_synknode_events using GlideRecord
        var gr = new GlideRecord("x_synknode_events");
        gr.initialize();
        gr.setValue("event_type", eventType);
        if (eventType === "file_transfer") {
            gr.setValue("sender_id", senderId);
            gr.setValue("receiver_id", reqBody.receiver_id || "");
            gr.setValue("file_name", fileName);
            gr.setValue("file_type", reqBody.file?.type || reqBody.file_type || "");
            gr.setValue("file_extension", reqBody.file?.extension || reqBody.file_extension || "");
            gr.setValue("size_bytes", reqBody.transfer?.bytes_transferred || reqBody.size_bytes || 0);
            gr.setValue("transfer_duration_ms", reqBody.transfer?.duration_ms || reqBody.transfer_duration_ms || 0);
            gr.setValue("transfer_status", reqBody.transfer?.status || reqBody.transfer_status || "completed");
        }
        else if (eventType === "page_visit") {
            gr.setValue("visit_url", reqBody.page?.url || reqBody.visit_url || "");
            gr.setValue("referrer_url", reqBody.page?.referrer || reqBody.referrer_url || "");
            gr.setValue("visit_id", reqBody.visit_id || reqBody.page?.visit_id || "");
        }
        // General falls-back
        gr.setValue("visit_url", reqBody.page?.url || reqBody.visit_url || gr.getValue("visit_url"));
        gr.setValue("referrer_url", reqBody.page?.referrer || reqBody.referrer_url || gr.getValue("referrer_url"));
        gr.setValue("visit_id", reqBody.page?.visit_id || reqBody.visit_id || gr.getValue("visit_id"));
        gr.setValue("session_id", reqBody.session_id || "");
        // Handle timestamp formatting for GlideDateTime
        var gdt = new GlideDateTime();
        gdt.setValueUTC(timestampStr.replace("T", " ").replace("Z", ""));
        gr.setValue("timestamp", gdt);
        gr.setValue("app_version", reqBody.meta?.version || reqBody.app_version || "1.0.0");
        var sysId = gr.insert();
        if (sysId) {
            response.setStatus(201);
            response.setBody({ result: "Created", sys_id: sysId });
        }
        else {
            response.setStatus(500);
            response.setBody({ error: "Failed to insert record" });
        }
    }
    catch (ex) {
        gs.error("Error in SynkNode Events POST API: " + ex.message);
        response.setStatus(500);
        response.setBody({ error: ex.message });
    }
}
]]></content>
    <external_source>false</external_source>
    <path>x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/src/server/events-handler.ts</path>
    <sys_name>x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/src/server/events-handler.ts</sys_name>
  </sys_module>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_module_fceb4e337d7340139f8d4de7da43c7ac
sys_update_xml.payload:
<record_update>
  <sys_module action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">

    <external_source>false</external_source>
    <content><![CDATA[{
  "$schema": "http://cyclonedx.org/schema/bom-1.6.schema.json",

  "specVersion": "1.6",
  "version": 1,
  "serialNumber": "urn:uuid:61e309b8-17cc-482b-97ff-e275b49b9b70",
  "metadata": {
    "timestamp": "2026-06-21T06:18:04.380Z",
    "tools": {
      "components": [
        {
          "type": "library",
          "name": "sdk-build-plugins",
          "group": "@servicenow",
          "version": "0.0.1",
          "author": "ServiceNow"
        }
      ]
    },
    "component": {
      "type": "application",
      "name": "synknode-analytics",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "bom-ref": "pkg:servicenow/synknode-analytics@1.0.0?sys_scope_id=26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9",
      "description": "SynkNode Platform Analytics Integration Scoped App",
      "purl": "pkg:servicenow/synknode-analytics@1.0.0?sys_scope_id=26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9"
    }
  },
  "components": [],
  "dependencies": [
    {
      "ref": "pkg:servicenow/synknode-analytics@1.0.0?sys_scope_id=26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9"
    }
  ]
}]]></content>
  </sys_module>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_ws_definition"> <sys_ws_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>ba0a27447bab4e8b9e47a68e45f41a6b</sys_id> <sys_scope display_value="x_synknode">26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_ws_definition_ba0a27447bab4e8b9e47a68e45f41a6b</sys_update_name> <active>true</active> <base_uri>/api/x_synknode/synknode_analytics</base_uri> <consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes> <consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized> <default_version>No active default version</default_version> <doc_link/> <enforce_acl>cf9d01d3e73003009d6247e603f6a990</enforce_acl> <is_versioned>false</is_versioned> <name>SynkNode Analytics</name> <namespace>x_synknode</namespace> <produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces> <produces_customized>false</produces_customized> <service_id>synknode_analytics</service_id> <short_description/> <sys_policy/> </sys_ws_definition> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ws_operation_9f53aec9cf03423bb0bfab9d6e0a1d63
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_ws_operation"> <sys_ws_operation action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>9f53aec9cf03423bb0bfab9d6e0a1d63</sys_id> <sys_scope display_value="x_synknode">26571502d0a642339adf60a7edf6fab9</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_ws_operation_9f53aec9cf03423bb0bfab9d6e0a1d63</sys_update_name> <active>true</active> <consumes>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</consumes> <consumes_customized>false</consumes_customized> <default_operation_uri>/api/x_synknode/synknode_analytics/events</default_operation_uri> <enforce_acl>cf9d01d3e73003009d6247e603f6a990</enforce_acl> <http_method>POST</http_method> <name>events</name> <operation_script><![CDATA[// @fluent-module processEvents;false;x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/src/server/events-handler.ts // WARNING: This code is generated by the ServiceNow SDK in order to provide // support for modular JavaScript. Modifications of any kind are likely to // result in unintended behavior. In most cases, you should edit the source // file of the module imported below. If you are absolutely certain you want // to take control of this code, you can remove this comment to prevent the // SDK from regenerating it. However, you will then be responsible for the // management of this code in your Fluent file. const { processEvents } = require('x_synknode/synknode-analytics/1.0.0/src/server/events-handler.ts'); processEvents(request, response);]]></operation_script> <operation_uri>/api/x_synknode/synknode_analytics/events</operation_uri> <produces>application/json,application/xml,text/xml</produces> <produces_customized>false</produces_customized> <relative_path>/events</relative_path> <request_example/> <requires_acl_authorization>true</requires_acl_authorization> <requires_authentication>true</requires_authentication> <requires_snc_internal_role>true</requires_snc_internal_role> <short_description/> <sys_policy/> <web_service_definition>ba0a27447bab4e8b9e47a68e45f41a6b</web_service_definition> <web_service_version/> </sys_ws_operation> </record_update>
